// Mock bookings data — replace with Firebase later
export const MOCK_BOOKINGS = [
  {
    id: 'MZY-A1B2C3',
    guestName: 'Maria Santos',
    guestEmail: 'maria@email.com',
    checkIn: '2026-06-21',
    checkOut: '2026-06-24',
    nights: 3,
    room: { id: 'sakura-suite', name: 'Sakura Suite', icon: '🌸', price: 8500 },
    guests: 2,
    specialRequests: 'Anniversary celebration, flower arrangement please.',
    total: 28560,
    paid: true,
    status: 'confirmed',
    createdAt: '2026-06-10T08:32:00',

  {
    id: 'MZY-D4E5F6',
    guestName: 'Jose Reyes',
    guestEmail: 'jose.reyes@gmail.com',

    nights: 2,
    room: { id: 'bamboo-deluxe', name: 'Bamboo Deluxe', icon: '🎋', price: 6200 },
    guests: 3,
    specialRequests: '',
    total: 13888,
    paid: false,

  {

  {
